rules_observed: Original incoming files were not deleted or modified.
Application source code, database, migrations, and UI were not modified.
Files were copied or extracted into official source folders only.
Archive path context was flattened into filenames for import-validator compatibility.

classification_decisions.reason: Archive and enclosed PDFs identify Coralina e-brochures.
Archive and enclosed PDFs identify Coralina price-list materials.
Standalone PDF filename identifies Coralina price list.

classification_decisions.source: CLK - Master Plan Price list V.2 - updated 03.07.26.pdf
classification_decisions.reason: Standalone PDF filename identifies Coralina master-plan price list.
Archive and enclosed PDF/JPG files identify Coralina master plan material.
Official target has no separate floor-plan folder; supported plan files map to unit-plans.
Archive and enclosed PDF/JPG files identify Coralina unit plans.
Perspective render archive contains Coralina project imagery.
Show-unit photo archive contains Coralina imagery.
Archive and enclosed MP4 files identify Coralina videos.
Company profile is a supplemental Coralina document.
Facilities PDF is a supplemental Coralina document.
Furniture package PDFs are supplemental Coralina documents.
Living services PDF is a supplemental Coralina document.
Map PDF/JPEG files are supplemental location documents; no official map folder exists for this task.
